data.description:
## What
Rename TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR -> REBAR_TRACKER_DIR (slice of EV-3 / 15f6): the decoupled/relocated store dir is a SUPPORTED feature (decision var 4); prefer the REBAR_-prefixed name, honor the old name during a deprecation window with a warning.

## Scope / Deliverables
- The 7 env-read sites prefer REBAR_TRACKER_DIR, fall back to TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR (deprecation warning): config.py tracker_dir, _engine_support/reads.py, _engine_support/bridge_fsck.py, _engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_translate.py, _cli/_init.py, _cli/__init__.py (2 gate checks).
- A single shared resolver helper to avoid duplicating the prefer/alias/warn logic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] REBAR_TRACKER_DIR honored everywhere TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR was; old name aliased + warned during deprecation
- [ ] Relocated-tracker tests pass under both names; full non-integration suite green
data.title: EV-3b: rename TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR -> REBAR_TRACKER_DIR (alias window)
